cards.title: Encoding
cards.governance_note: Document encoding, schema, format, version, and interpretation rules.

cards.title: Compression
cards.governance_note: Define lossless or lossy policy, fidelity needs, and reconstruction expectations.

cards.title: Information Efficiency
cards.governance_note: Balance storage, transmission, computation, interpretability, accessibility, and preservation.

cards.title: Representation Risk
cards.governance_note: Audit what is lost, hidden, omitted, approximated, or made hard to interpret.
